notableEvents.label: Yoán Moncada pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yoán Moncada walks. Jo Adell to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Braydon Fisher on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Lenyn Sosa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Lenyn Sosa grounds into a double play, second baseman Vaughn Grissom to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Jesús Sánchez out at 2nd. Lenyn Sosa out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Davis Schneider pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Davis Schneider grounds out, third baseman Vaughn Grissom to first baseman Nolan Schanuel.

notableEvents.label: Eloy Jiménez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eloy Jiménez singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe. Kazuma Okamoto to 3rd.
